name: ScreenCast
tagline: Record your screen, webcam, or both. Instant sharing, auto-transcripts, and viewer analytics. Professional video messaging, completely free.
metaDescription: ScreenCast is a free screen recording tool that replaces Loom. Record screen and webcam, get auto-transcripts, share instantly, and track viewer engagement. No time limits.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><text x="50" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-size="60">🎬</text></svg>

features.title: Screen & Webcam Recording
features.desc: Record your full screen, a specific window, or a selected region with optional webcam overlay. Switch between screen-only, cam-only, or picture-in-picture during recording.

features.title: Instant Sharing
features.desc: Get a shareable link the moment you stop recording. No upload wait times, no file size worries. Recipients watch in-browser without downloading anything.

features.title: Auto-Transcription
features.desc: Every recording is automatically transcribed with speaker detection. Viewers can search within transcripts and jump to specific moments in the video.

features.title: Video Editing
features.desc: Trim, cut, and stitch clips directly in the browser. Add callouts, blur sensitive areas, and insert chapter markers without exporting to a separate editing tool.

features.title: Viewer Analytics
features.desc: See who watched your video, how much they viewed, and where they dropped off. Get notified when key stakeholders open your recording.

features.title: Video Library
features.desc: Organize recordings into folders and workspaces. Tag videos by project, team, or topic. Full-text search across transcripts finds any recording in seconds.
